variants.title: Fleetguard FF5046 Fuel Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P550081
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard FF5046 Fuel Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P550081
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5046 spin-on fuel filter delivers superior performance using proven media technology, removing harmful contaminants. Fleetguard fuel filters ensure optimal fuel system protection to meet or exceed OEM specifications.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On, Efficiency 1: 95%, Outer Diameter: 84.1 mm, Length: 98.8 mm, Thread: M16 x 1.5, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 95%

variants.title: Donaldson P550081 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550081 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On, Efficiency 1: 95%, Outer Diameter: 84.1 mm, Length: 98.8 mm, Thread: M16 x 1.5, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 95%
